message:
feat(repair): add Local Reconstruction Codes for distributed repair (bd-2oc7)

Azure LRC scheme (Huang et al. 2012) with local XOR parity groups and
global Reed-Solomon parity in GF(256). Single-failure repair reads only
local group (4 blocks) vs 13+ for full erasure. Gaussian elimination for
multi-failure global recovery. 16 tests including GF(256) arithmetic,
local/global encode/decode, and I/O comparison.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
